description: Conservation law constraints used by PhysicsGuard's constraint_mapper and flag_engine. Each law defines lhs/rhs balance conditions with tolerance thresholds. Verdicts: CLEAN (delta < tolerance), SUSPECT (tolerance < delta < 2×tolerance), CORRUPTED (delta > 2×tolerance).

laws.name: Conservation of Energy (First Law)
laws.statement: Energy cannot be created or destroyed, only transformed. In any process, total energy in must equal total energy out plus storage change.

laws.name: Entropy Never Decreases (Second Law)
laws.statement: The entropy of an isolated system never decreases. Every real process generates waste heat — order requires energy input.
laws.constraint: lhs >= rhs (entropy cannot decrease in isolated system)
laws.esp_check: cascade_engine KNOWN_LOOPS: feedback loops are entropy-producing dissipative structures

laws.name: Conservation of Mass (Continuity)
laws.statement: Mass cannot be created or destroyed in non-nuclear processes. The continuity equation must hold.

laws.name: Information Conservation (Landauer + DPI + NFL)
laws.statement: Information is physical. Erasing 1 bit costs kT ln 2 energy minimum. Processing cannot create information (DPI). Learning requires data (NFL).

sub_laws.name: Landauer's Principle
sub_laws.constraint: Information erasure has minimum energy cost

sub_laws.name: Data Processing Inequality (DPI)
sub_laws.formal: I(X;Z) ≤ I(X;Y) for Markov chain X→Y→Z

sub_laws.name: No-Free-Lunch Theorem (NFL)
sub_laws.formal: ∀ learner L, E[performance(L)] = constant over all distributions

laws.esp_check: assumption_validator: each boundary has explicit units and confidence levels

laws.name: Generic Conservation Law Template
laws.statement: For any conserved quantity Q, the rate of change within a control volume equals net flux through boundaries plus internal sources/sinks.
laws.note: Template used by constraint_mapper.py to generate domain-specific conservation checks

verdict_pipeline.description: PhysicsGuard's flag_engine processes claims through this pipeline

stages.name: parse
stages.description: Extract claim structure and identify referenced quantities

stages.name: constrain
stages.description: Map claim to applicable conservation laws from laws registry

stages.name: check
stages.description: Evaluate lhs/rhs balance for each applicable law

stages.name: score
stages.description: Aggregate flags into final verdict with severity score 0.0-1.0

natural_constants.description: Immutable physical constants used as reality anchors — cannot be socially engineered
